vineyards.name: Taylor's Port
vineyards.address: Rua do Choupelo 250, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
vineyards.owner: The Fladgate Partnership (Yeatman and Bearsley families)
vineyards.tasting_program: Audio-guided cellar tour in 13 languages plus tastings; restaurant Barao Fladgate on site.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1692, Taylor's is one of the oldest Port houses and a Fladgate Partnership flagship, famed for long-aged tawnies and structured Vintage Port aged at its Gaia cellars.

verified.address_quoted: Rua do Choupelo nº 250 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal

vineyards.name: Fonseca Porto

vineyards.tasting_program: Cellar visits and tastings in Gaia; Quinta do Panascal visitor estate in the Douro.
vineyards.description: A Fladgate Partnership house founded in 1815, Fonseca is known for richly fruited Vintage Port and the popular Bin 27 reserve, with cellars in Gaia and the Quinta do Panascal estate.

verified.address_quoted: Rua do Choupelo 84, 4400-187 Vila Nova de Gaia

vineyards.name: Graham's Port

vineyards.description: A Symington house founded in 1820, Graham's ages its Port at the hilltop 1890 Lodge in Gaia and is known for richly sweet Vintage Port and the Six Grapes reserve.
